name: Ognisco
short_description: Ognisco is a short (1 - 2 hours ), top-down "search action adventure" game inspired by the games of 8-bit era. Your goal is to defeat all the bosses. To do it, you need to explore the world, find new skills, upgrades and secrets. If you're nostalgic for retro gaming, Ognisco is for you!
detailed_description: Ognisco is a short, top-down "search action adventure" game that pays homage to the classic 8-bit era. In this hour / two hours-long journey, your primary objective is to defeat all the bosses. To accomplish this, you’ll explore the world, discover new skills, secrets, and purchase upgrades. If you are nostalgic for retro gaming, Ognisco is for you!
about_the_game: Ognisco is a short, top-down "search action adventure" game that pays homage to the classic 8-bit era. In this hour / two hours-long journey, your primary objective is to defeat all the bosses. To accomplish this, you’ll explore the world, discover new skills, secrets, and purchase upgrades. If you are nostalgic for retro gaming, Ognisco is for you!
